public.description: Latest public U.S. labor-market snapshot with stable source and release metadata.

premium.description: Historical labor-market snapshots, revisions, deltas, and agent-oriented comparison metadata.

listing.title: Income For Everyone Labor Stats History API
listing.summary: Pay-per-request U.S. labor-market history and revision data for agents tracking automation, employment, wages, and labor slack.
listing.guidance: Use the public snapshot for latest headline values. Use the paid history endpoint when an agent needs time series snapshots, month-over-month deltas, revision context, or machine-readable provenance.
